context: Tests whether the agent catches common DockKit custom tracking mistakes and uses current API details.

checklist.name: System tracking disabled
checklist.description: Explains that custom DockAccessory.track calls require disabling system tracking first.

checklist.name: Track cadence
checklist.description: Corrects the 5 fps or 1 fps cadence to the supported 10-30 fps range for track(_:cameraInformation:).

checklist.name: Observation coordinates
checklist.description: Corrects UIKit view coordinates to normalized observation rectangles with DockKit/Vision lower-left origin coordinates.

checklist.name: Camera information
checklist.description: Builds DockAccessory.CameraInformation from the active AVCaptureDevice type, position, orientation, intrinsics, and reference dimensions as available.

checklist.name: Image overload shape
checklist.description: States that CVPixelBuffer is supplied through separate image: overloads and is required when those overloads are chosen, not an optional parameter on every track call.

checklist.name: Orientation animation rate
checklist.description: Warns that animate(motion:) and setOrientation(_:duration:relative:) should not be called more than twice per second.

checklist.name: Observation type cases
checklist.description: Uses .humanFace, .humanBody, or .object observation types appropriately and avoids inventing unsupported observation cases.
